Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Oct-06-2023 Granted Per Written Order

First Account And Report Of Trustee; Petition For Approval Thereof
Off Calendar Oct-06-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

The following matters were heard: PTR-22-305636 The Survivor's Trust Created Under The James Family Trust; PTR-22-305637 The Marital Trust Created Under The James Family Trust; PTR-22-305638 The Exempt Marital Trust Created Under The James Family Trust; PTR-22-305639 The Credit Shelter Trust Created Under The James Family Trust.

Appearances: Frank Cialone appeared by zoom for Norman Berkman (petitioner/trustee).
Gary Kershner appeared by zoom for Nanette Leuschel (trustee of the Matthew James Trust).
Gordon Shaller appeared by zoom for Chris James and Jeff James (beneficiaries).
Garrett Barlow appeared by zoom for Alex James (benefidicary).

The Court hearing no objections is taking all matters under submission.

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: A. Datt: Deputy: Carbona: Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Sep-18-2023 Continued To Oct-02-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Sep-06-2023 Continued To Sep-18-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

First Account And Report Of Trustee; Petition For Approval Thereof
Off Calendar Jul-10-2023 Continued To Oct-02-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

The following matters were heard: PTR-22-305636 The Survivor's Trust Created Under The James Family Trust; PTR-22-305637 The Marital Trust Created Under The James Family Trust;
PTR-22-305638 The Exempt Marital Trust Created Under The James Family Trust; PTR-22-305639 The Credit Shelter Trust Created Under The James Family Trust.

Appearances: Frank Cialone appeared by zoom for Norman Berkman (petitioner/trustee).
Gary Kershner appeared by zoom for Nanette Leuschel (trustee of the Matthew James Trust).
Neil Erickson appeared by zoom for Chris James and Jeff James (beneficiaries).
Garrett Barlow appeared by zoom for Alex James (benefidicary).

The court stated that this petition was filed in September of 2022, that at the time of the hearing in January Chris and Jeff appeared and indicated that they would be filing objections, that examiner's notes were issued and that the trustee responded to the notes. The court also stated that it has a well framed petition and a well framed response to the notes, and that as of yet, there are no written objections. Mr. Erickson stated that he is second counsel for Chris and Jeff, that they have been working with counsel for the trustee, that he has reached an impasse with his clients and that he will be withdrawing as counsel. Mr. Erickson also stated that he notified the parties and that they agreed to continue the matter to give him time to file a substitution of attorney. Counsel expressed that the beneficiaries have had ample time to consider the petitions with counsel, that they would like to move forward, that there has been substantial delay, provided history of the filings, the objections and the multiple attorneys that have come in and out, the amount of fees that have been incurred, that it is not appropriate to delay any further, the numerous amount of phone calls and e-mails, etc. The court stated that the time has come for it to set a deadline. All four First Accounts and Reports of Trustee are continued to October 2, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Any written objections to the four petitions are to be filed by August 21, 2023. Responses are to be filed by September 21, 2023.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

First Account And Report Of Trustee; Petition For Approval Thereof
Off Calendar May-24-2023 Continued To Jul-10-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

First Account And Report Of Trustee; Petition For Approval Thereof
Off Calendar Mar-29-2023 Continued To May-24-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

First Account And Report Of Trustee; Petition For Approval Thereof
Off Calendar Jan-18-2023 Continued To Mar-29-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
This matter was called with case nos. PTR-22-305637 (the Marital Trust Created Under the James Family Trust); PTR-22-305638 (the Exempt Marital Trust Created Under the James Family Trust); and PTR-22-305639 (the Credit Shelter Trust Created Under the James Family Trust).

Appearances via Zoom: Susan von Herrmann, Esq. and Frank Cialone, Esq. for Norman Berkman (Petitioner/Trustee). Blake Rummell, Esq. for Christopher James and Geoffrey James (Interested Parties). Nanette Leuschel (Trustee for Matthew James/Interested Party).

Mr. Rummell stated that he had technical difficulties getting the objections on file, that he would be filing formal objections in all four cases, that he requested and just received the supplementals, and that he would need a few days to get the objections on file. Mr. Cialone stated that he needs to file an association re: the objections filed yesterday, that he only has the objections for the survivor's trust, and requested a continuance of 45 to 60 days to get responses on file. Mr. Rummell requested a 60-day continuance.

At the conclusion of comments, the First Account and Report of Trustee; Petition for Approval Thereof (in all four cases) is continued to March 29, 2023, at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: H. Singh. Matter not reported.

First Account And Report Of Trustee; Petition For Approval Thereof
Off Calendar Dec-06-2022 Continued To Jan-18-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
